Vehicle.Name: LAAT/c Assault Carrier
Vehicle.Description: [H3]LAAT/c Assault Carrier[h3] Please see page 65 of the Collapse of the Republic Sourcebook for details.

Mod.MiscDesc: [B]Rapid Walker Deployment[b]: The LAAT/c can deploy a walker to the field while still moving. As an action, the pilot may make a [B]Hard ([DI][DI][DI]) Piloting (Planetary) check[b] upgraded a number of times equal to the LAAT/c's current speed. If the pilot succeeds, the walker deploys safely. If the pilot fails, the walker deploys but suffers an immediate Critical Hit as if it had suffered a collision.

Vehicle.StarFighters: One AT-TE walker, four AT-RT walkers
Vehicle.Crew: One pilot, one c-pilot, one loadmaster/engineer
